data.title: Falling Miner Profitability Forces Bitmain to Reprice Bitcoin Mining Hardware
data.description:
The global market for Bitcoin mining equipment is showing clear signs of strain, with Bitmain cutting prices aggressively across much of its product lineup.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/falling-miner-profitability-forces-bitmain-to-reprice-bitcoin-mining-hardware/

data.title: Solana Co-Founder Predicts Key Developments by 2026
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the co-founder of Solana shared insights on social media regarding anticipated advancements by 2026 in areas such as stablecoins, cutting-edge technology, and artificial intelligence. The predictions include the stablecoin market surpassing $1 trillion, while breakthroughs in quantum computing and controlled nuclear fusion remain elusive. Additionally, artificial intelligence is expected to solve a 'millennium mathematical problem,' and the shipment of humanoid robots is projected to reach 100,000 units.

data.title: Significant Outflows from U.S. Spot Bitcoin ETFs This Week
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Farside monitoring has reported a net outflow of $589.4 million from U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs this week. The breakdown of the outflows is as follows:

IBIT experienced a net outflow of $242.7 million, while FBTC saw $110.7 million withdrawn. BITB had a net outflow of $54 million, and ARKB recorded $31.3 million in outflows. EZBC faced a net outflow of $5.1 million, and HODL saw $41.6 million withdrawn. GBTC experienced a net outflow of $72.8 million, and Grayscale BTC had $31.2 million in outflows.

data.title: Strategy Bolsters Liquidity Management with $2.2 Billion Cash Reserve
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Strategy is intensifying its focus on liquidity management by establishing a $2.2 billion cash reserve. This move aims to facilitate the payment of preferred stock dividends and debt interest without the need to sell Bitcoin holdings.

The cash reserve is considered a crucial step in stabilizing the company's financial structure and mitigating the risk of forced asset sales, as the valuation premium relative to its Bitcoin holdings gradually declines.

data.title: Artists dump X as launch of new AI image editing feature sparks outrage
data.description:
Digital artists and illustrators are abandoning Elon Musk’s blogging platform X (formerly Twitter) over the introduction of a new controversial image-editing feature powered by artificial intelligence (AI). According to reports, the creators claimed that the new tool could be used to modify others’ works without their consent. Reports claimed that the exodus is being led […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/artists-dump-x-ai-editing-outrage/

data.title: China forces all AI systems to follow “socialist values” in major crackdown
data.description:
China requires AI providers to notify users they're interacting with machines every two hours and when overdependence is detected.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-ai-systems-follow-socialist-values/

data.title: Lugano Expands Bitcoin Payments for Municipal Services
data.description:
Lugano implements cryptocurrency payments for taxes, attracting global interest and industry innovation.
source: https://coincu.com/news/lugano-bitcoin-municipal-payments/

data.title: Bitmine begins staking ETH, deposits $219M into Ethereum PoS contract
data.description:
Ethereum treasury firm Bitmine has begun staking Ether after depositing nearly $219 million worth of ETH into Ethereum’s proof-of-stake system.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitmine-begins-staking-eth-deposits-219m-pos-contract?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: 228,876 Americans Warned After Hackers Hit Financial Firm – Names, Social Security Numbers and More Potentially Exposed
data.description:
Nearly a quarter of a million Americans are being warned that their personal and financial information may have been exposed after hackers breached a US-based financial services firm.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/12/27/228876-americans-warned-after-hackers-hit-financial-firm-names-social-security-numbers-and-more-potentially-exposed/

data.title: JPMorgan Sees Stablecoin Market Below $600B by 2028
data.description:
JPMorgan projects stablecoin growth to $500–$600 billion by 2028, driven by crypto activity, not large-scale payment adoption.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/jpmorgan-sees-stablecoin-market-below-600b-by-2028/

data.title: North Korean crypto money launderer wanted by the FBI
data.description:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has declared Sim Hyon-sop, an alleged cryptocurrency launderer for North Korea, wanted.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/north-korean-crypto-launderer-wanted-fbi/

data.title: Strategy Prepares Defensive Strategy Amid Bitcoin Challenges
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, a recent analysis reported by CNBC highlights that the stock price of Bitcoin treasury company Strategy remains low, with the Bitcoin premium indicator also declining. A crucial decision regarding whether the MSCI index will exclude Strategy is expected in January. In response to this situation, Strategy is adopting a 'defensive mode' strategy. Recently, the company has established a cash buffer of approximately $2.2 billion to withstand the challenges of its Bitcoin investments. This fund is anticipated to be used for paying preferred stock dividends and debt interest rather than purchasing additional Bitcoin.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Giant Bitmain Cuts Prices on Mining Rigs
data.description:
Bitmain, the largest producer of Bitcoin mining hardware, has begun offering unusually steep discounts across multiple generations of ASICs.
source: https://coindoo.com/bitcoin-mining-giant-bitmain-cuts-prices-on-mining-rigs/

data.title: XRP set to drift sideways until new catalysts hit
data.description:
Nansen’s Jake Kennis says ETF approvals and integration with global payment rails may catalyze XRP price appreciation.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/xrp-set-to-drift-sideways/

data.title: Bitcoin May Enter Decade-Long Bull Run After 2025 Bear Market: Samson Mow
data.description:
Samson Mow and PlanC argue that 2025 marked a stealth bear market, setting the stage for a Bitcoin bull run.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-may-enter-decade-long-bull-run-after-2025-bear-market-samson-mow/

data.title: Aave DAO Vote Collapse Exposes Deep Fault Lines in Protocol Governance
data.description:
A pivotal governance vote inside the Aave ecosystem has failed decisively, triggering renewed debate over who truly controls the protocol’s future. On December 26, 2025, token holders rejected a proposal that aimed to shift ownership of Aave’s brand assets away from Aave Labs and into a DAO-controlled legal structure.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/aave-dao-vote-collapse-exposes-deep-fault-lines-in-protocol-governance/

data.title: Tom Lee Predicts Ethereum Price Surge by 2026
data.description: According to Odaily, Tom Lee has suggested that the tokenization of assets could potentially drive the price of Ethereum (ETH) to between $7,000 and $9,000 by early 2026.

data.title: TRON Network Hits Record Usage While TRX Price Posts Its Worst Q4 in Years
data.description:
The TRON Network has achieved unprecedented levels of usage recently, experiencing a surge in activity that sets a new record, demonstrating its growing popularity and engagement among users. However, despite this impressive milestone, the price of TRX has faced significant challenges, recording its worst performance in the fourth quarter in several years, indicating a stark contrast between the network's operational success and the struggles faced in the cryptocurrency market.
source: https://blocknews.com/tron-network-hits-record-usage-while-trx-price-posts-its-worst-q4-in-years/

data.title: Tom Lee: Asset tokenization may push ETH to $7,000 to $9,000 by early 2026.
data.description: Tom Lee stated that asset tokenization could push the price of ETH to $7,000 to $9,000 by early 2026. (Cointelegraph)
